subparts.text: Differentiate between a database system and a data warehouse.
What is ETL? Explain each component.
Define star schema with an example.
What is OLAP? List its types and key characteristics.
Define data mining and explain the role of KDD.
Discuss the importance of data mining in business decision-making.
Write a short note on outlier analysis.
What are the benefits of using association rule mining?

questions.question_text: Explain the architecture of a data warehouse. Discuss the three-tier architecture and the role of metadata in detail.
Discuss data pre-processing in detail. Explain data cleaning and data transformation with suitable examples.
Define dimensional modeling. Explain STAR, Snowflake, and Fact Constellation schemas with appropriate diagrams.
What are OLAP operations? Describe with suitable examples: drill- down, roll-up, slice, dice, and pivot.
Differentiate classification and prediction in data mining. How does decision tree induction work? Illustrate with an example.
What is KNN algorithm? Explain its working and use cases. Compare it with Decision Tree classification. CO Mapping
What is clustering in data mining? Explain the K-Means algorithm with an example. Mention its limitations.
What will be the association rules using Apriori Algorithm: Given the following transactions: TID Items T1 A, B, C T2 A, C T3 A, D T4 B, E T5 A, B, C, E T6 B, C Support : 50% Confidence: 75%
